test_cases.description: Progressive refinement with export - Finance transformation campaign

user_message_variants: hi
hello
hey
hi there
hello there
greetings
turns.expected_response: Hello! I am the Orchestrator Agent for the Deloitte Conversational AI marketing and campaign optimization platform. How can I assist you today?

turns.user_message: i am creating a finance transformation campaign in US, help me find audience
user_message_variants: i am creating a finance transformation campaign in US, help me find audience
help me find audience for a finance transformation campaign in the US
I need to identify an audience for a US finance transformation campaign
can you help me segment audience for finance transformation in United States
find me target audience for US finance transformation initiative
turns.expected_response: Here are the existing audience segments based on the available data: 1) The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist (14,008 accounts, 33,764 contacts), 2) The Strategist with Broad Interests (18,869 accounts, 65,476 contacts), 3) The Next-Gen Finance Leader (28,753 accounts, 87,332 contacts), 4) The Executive Change Agent (43,187 accounts, 149,977 contacts), 5) The Financial Systems Expert (29,581 accounts, 114,306 contacts).

turns.user_message: give me a deeper breakdown for The Next-Gen Finance Leader
user_message_variants: give me a deeper breakdown for The Next-Gen Finance Leader
show me more details about The Next-Gen Finance Leader
can you provide a detailed analysis of The Next-Gen Finance Leader segment
I want to see the breakdown for Next-Gen Finance Leader
tell me more about the Next-Gen Finance Leader segment
turns.expected_response: Account Breakdowns for The Next-Gen Finance Leader: Top 5 accounts include 159699 (1.01%), 255527 (0.59%), 204617 (0.51%), 188155 (0.44%), 68365 (0.41%). Audience interaction shows engagement decline with opens down 90.71% and clicks down 71.5%, indicating urgent need for optimization.

turns.user_message: give me a deeper breakdown for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
user_message_variants: give me a deeper breakdown for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
show details for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist
analyze The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist segment
what about The Integrated Finance and Tax Strategist
breakdown for Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist please

acceptable_values: The Integrated Finance and Tax Strategist

turns.expected_response: Account Breakdown for The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist: Top 5 accounts are 159699 (2.9%), 188155 (1.18%), 51691 (0.82%), 119405 (0.77%), 103095 (0.53%). Exceptional engagement with 601.9% increase in opens and 386.4% increase in clicks, demonstrating highly effective outreach.

turns.user_message: i like The Next-Gen Finance Leader and only keep job levels: Executive and C-suite
user_message_variants: i like The Next-Gen Finance Leader and only keep job levels: Executive and C-suite
filter The Next-Gen Finance Leader to only show Executives and C-suite
keep only executive and c-suite levels for Next-Gen Finance Leader
I want Next-Gen Finance Leader segment but just executives and c-level
refine to executives and c-suite in The Next-Gen Finance Leader
turns.expected_response: Here is your refined audience: Updated Total Contacts: 39,386. Active Filters: Segment (The Next-Gen Finance Leader), Country (US), Job Level (Executive, C-Suite).

turns.user_message: also only keep job function: Finance, Tax and Accounting
user_message_variants: also only keep job function: Finance, Tax and Accounting
add filter for Finance, Tax and Accounting job functions
only show Finance, Tax, and Accounting roles
filter to finance tax accounting functions
keep just Finance, Tax, Accounting job functions
turns.expected_response: Here is your refined audience: Updated Total Contacts: 31,217. Active Filters: Segment (The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist), Country (US), Job Level (Executive, C-Suite), Job Function (Finance, Tax, Accounting).

turns.user_message: give me top 5 account ids in this refined audience
user_message_variants: give me top 5 account ids in this refined audience
show me the top 5 accounts
what are the 5 biggest accounts in this audience
list the top 5 account IDs
can you show the top five accounts by size
turns.expected_response: Here are the top 5 accounts in your refined audience: 297949 (1820 contacts), 230542 (742 contacts), 68365 (158 contacts), 68748 (125 contacts), 238629 (106 contacts).

turns.user_message: also, from the refined audience I just want account ids 297949 and 230542
user_message_variants: also, from the refined audience I just want account ids 297949 and 230542
filter to only accounts 297949 and 230542
keep only account 297949 and account 230542
narrow down to accounts 297949, 230542
I only want these two accounts: 297949 and 230542
turns.expected_response: Here is your refined audience: Updated Total Contacts: 2,562. Active Filters: Segment (The Integrated Finance & Tax Strategist), Country (US), Job Level (Executive, C-Suite), Job Function (Finance, Tax, Accounting), Account ID (297949, 230542).

turns.user_message: yes, this is a good list export this final list of audience
user_message_variants: yes, this is a good list export this final list of audience
export this list please
can you export this audience
download this as CSV
save this audience list
export to file
turns.expected_response: The audience list has been successfully exported to the GCS bucket. The filename is us_executive_finance_tax_accounting_audience_20260609_090141.csv.

test_cases.description: Single segment deep-dive - Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader

user_message_variants: hi how can you help
hello what can you do
hey what are your capabilities
hi there how do you help
what can you assist with
turns.expected_response: I am the central Orchestrator Agent for the Deloitte Conversational AI marketing and campaign optimization platform. My primary objective is to receive your natural language queries and route them to the appropriate specialized sub-agents or tools to get the job done.

turns.user_message: i am creating a finance transformation campaign in US and help me find audience
user_message_variants: i am creating a finance transformation campaign in US and help me find audience
help me find audience for finance transformation in US
need audience segmentation for US finance transformation campaign
find target audience for finance transformation initiative in United States
I'm working on a US finance transformation campaign, help with audience
turns.expected_response: Here are the existing audience segments: 1) The Integrated Finance & Tech Strategist (14,007 accounts, 33,743 contacts), 2) The Growth-Oriented Tech & Finance Leader (18,782 accounts, 63,697 contacts), 3) The HR & Talent Operations Specialist (28,707 accounts, 87,162 contacts), 4) The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader (42,766 accounts, 145,921 contacts), 5) The Executive Finance & Tech Decision-Maker (29,051 accounts, 115,170 contacts).

turns.user_message: give me a deeper breakdown for The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader
user_message_variants: give me a deeper breakdown for The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader
show details about Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader
analyze The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader segment
breakdown for Commercial Tech-Savvy Finance Leader
more info on The Commercial and Tech-Savvy Finance Leader

acceptable_values: The Commercial and Tech-Savvy Finance Leader

turns.expected_response: Account Breakdowns for The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader: Top accounts include 119405 (0.69%), 159699 (0.51%), 230542 (1.1%), 232751 (0.5%), 297949 (6.8%). Audience interaction shows subtle negative trend with total campaigns -0.63%, total opened -0.8%, total clicked -0.77%, indicating minor contraction in engagement.

turns.user_message: i like The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader and keep job function Finance, Accounting, Tax and job levels: Executives, and Managers
user_message_variants: i like The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader and keep job function Finance, Accounting, Tax and job levels: Executives, and Managers
filter Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader to Finance, Accounting, Tax functions and Executive, Manager levels
keep only Finance, Tax, Accounting and Executives, Managers for this segment
apply filters: job functions Finance Tax Accounting, job levels Executive Manager
refine to executive and manager levels with finance, tax, accounting functions
turns.expected_response: Here is your refined audience: Updated Total Contacts: 38,387. Active Filters: Segment (The Commercial & Tech-Savvy Finance Leader), Country (US), Job Function (Finance, Accounting, Tax), Job Level (Executive, Manager).

turns.user_message: give me the top 5 accounts in this refined audience
user_message_variants: give me the top 5 accounts in this refined audience
show top 5 accounts
what are the biggest 5 accounts
list top five accounts
top 5 account IDs please
turns.expected_response: Here are the top 5 accounts in this refined audience by number of contacts: 297949 (1,657 contacts), 230542 (630 contacts), 68365 (395 contacts), 68748 (287 contacts), 119405 (196 contacts).
